name: sumi
description: Sumi — manage recurring summary tasks at any cadence, drawn from your connected tools and delivered where you want to review them. /sumi to set up, /sumi-run to trigger.

interface.shortDescription: Recurring summary tasks from your connected tools
interface.longDescription: Sumi manages recurring summary tasks of any cadence (daily, weekly, monthly, custom). Each task pulls from your connected tools (Google Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Slack), consolidates using a preset or custom template, applies a tone preset, and delivers drafts to a destination you pick (Slack message, Gmail draft to self, or local markdown file). Uses each runtime's native scheduler so scheduled runs are fully autonomous.
defaultPrompt: Create a new weekly team update with sumi.
